title: [Seroepidemiology and molecular epidemiology of enterovirus type 71 in the world and the Russian Federation].
author_string: Akhmadishina, L V, Koroleva, G A, Ivanova, O E, Trotsenko, O E, Mikhaĭlov, M I et al.
abstract: A review of recent publications on epidemiology and seroepidemiology of enterovirus type 71 in various regions of the world and authors' own results of study of seroepidemiology and molecular epidemiology of EV71 in Russia are presented.
